overview: The Department of Accounting is at the vanguard of this change, bringing cutting-edge technology into every aspect of our program. From blockchain and artificial intelligence to data analytics and cloud computing, we provide our pupils with the skills and knowledge they need to succeed in their accounting profession of today's digital era.
waiver_info: Result-based waiver (bachelor's), Waiver on SGPA (semester result), Female quota, Need-based, Quota for physically challenged/specially-abled, tribal/ethnic group quota, Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota, Waiver for DIU alumni, Group admission quota, Freedom fighter quota, And many more.
eligibility: Students having a minimum GPA of 2.5 both in SSC and HSC or equivalent background from any group may apply for admission in the BBA in Accounting. Information Systems. Completing five O-level subjects with at least GPA 2.5 and at least two A-Level subjects with at least GPA 2.5 (Below C grade in any subject is not acceptable) may apply for admission.
curriculum_highlights: Corporate tax and VAT in Bangladesh
Forensic and Cyber Security in Accounting
Forensic Accounting and Financial Fraud Investigation
Introduction to Cyber Security for Business
Database Management and Decision Support Systems
Business Analytics for Data-Driven Decision Making
Spreadsheet Analysis, Modeling and Accounting Software
